topics.topic_en: Constitutional Amendment Vote Blocked by PPP Boycott
topics.summary: On May 7, the National Assembly held a plenary vote on a constitutional amendment bill—incorporating martial law reform, 5·18 and Busan-Masan democratic heritage in the preamble, and regional balance provisions—but the PPP boycotted en masse, causing the vote to fall short of the required two-thirds quorum. Speaker Woo Won-shik pleaded for participation and announced a re-vote attempt for May 8.

evidence_headlines.title: 39년만의 개헌, 국힘 불참에 처리 불발…내일 재시도(종합)
국힘 보이콧에 개헌안 '투표 불성립'… 우 의장 '8일 재상정'
"왜 안 들어와?" 의장 폭발‥"양심과 소신 짓밟지 마" [현장영상]

topics.topic_en: Lee Jae-myung Prosecution Dismissal Special Counsel Bill
topics.topic_ko: 이재명 대통령 공소취소 특검법 추진 논란
topics.summary: The ruling DPK is advancing legislation to retroactively dismiss criminal charges against President Lee Jae-myung, framing it as correcting alleged prosecutorial misconduct; the PPP staged a field supreme council meeting outside Cheong Wa Dae, calling it a 'self-acquittal bill' and a gateway to one-man rule, and vowed to oppose it alongside civic groups and opposition parties.

evidence_headlines.title: 국민의힘, 靑 앞서 최고위 개최...장동혁 "공소취소 특검으로 李 독재 시작"
국힘 "李대통령 공소취소 반대하는 모든 정당·시민단체와 함께 투쟁"
국민의힘, '반특검' 결집..한동훈發 내홍 조짐이 변수

topics.topic_en: Han Deok-su Appeal Sentence 15 Years for Insurrection
topics.topic_ko: 한덕수 전 총리 항소심 징역 15년 선고
topics.summary: The Seoul High Court on May 7 sentenced former Prime Minister Han Deok-su to 15 years in prison on appeal for key participation in the December 3 insurrection, reducing the first-instance 23-year sentence but upholding the conviction; the ruling found he failed to stop the unlawful martial law declaration and participated in planning it.

evidence_headlines.title: [종합] 한덕수, 2심도 '내란 가담' 인정…형량은 대폭 감형돼 '징역 15년'
한덕수 2심 징역 15년 선고…1심보다 형량 8년 줄어
[일지] 12·3 계엄부터 한덕수 前총리 2심 징역 15년까지

topics.topic_en: Yoon Seok-yeol Insurrection Trial Verdict Approaching
topics.summary: Yoon Seok-yeol's insurrection trial is heading toward a May 28 verdict; he was separately sentenced to 7 years on appeal in late April for obstructing his own arrest, and the PPP has formally declined to issue any leadership comment on the proceedings.

evidence_headlines.title: 윤석열 내란 재판/전개 - 선고기일 (2026년 5월 28일)
2026년 5월 윤석열 체포방해 항소심 결과·형량·판단 근거 3가지

topics.topic_en: June 3 Local Elections Party Support Gap Widens
topics.summary: With the June 3 nationwide local elections less than a month away, polling shows DPK at 46% versus PPP at 18% nationally; PPP faces particular difficulty in Seoul and the Busan-Gyeongnam region, and the party's recent low of 15% has only partially recovered to 18% despite conservative consolidation efforts.

evidence_headlines.title: [속보] 국힘 18%로 반등했지만 서울·PK 패색 더 짙어져…TK 1당 탈환도 못해 [NBS]
전국지표조사 5월 1주차, 민주 46% 국힘 18%
다양한 지방선거 기사를 만나보세요

topics.topic_en: PPP Internal Split Over Han Dong-hoon Independent Run
topics.topic_ko: 한동훈 무소속 출마로 국민의힘 내홍 격화
topics.summary: Former PPP leader Han Dong-hoon is running as an independent in the Busan Buk-Gap by-election, drawing support from pro-Han PPP lawmakers against party leadership's wishes; PPP leader Jang Dong-hyuk has warned of disciplinary action against any member who campaigns for Han, while Seoul PPP councillors have publicly criticized the prolonged intra-party conflict.

evidence_headlines.title: 장동혁 "한동훈 지원, 필요한 조치할 것"...국민의힘 내홍 격화 조짐
국힘 서울시의원·당원들, '한동훈 제명' 당내 갈등 비판‥"지선 승리할 마지막 골든타임"
하정우 38% 박민식 26% 한동훈 21%…양자대결 묻자 [여론조사]

topics.topic_en: Hormuz Strait Deployment Pressure from Trump
topics.topic_ko: 트럼프 호르무즈 해협 파병 요구 대응
topics.summary: The Lee government is deliberating whether to commit warships to the Hormuz Strait after Trump again demanded Korea join 'Project Freedom' following the alleged Iranian attack on a Korean-flagged bulk carrier; Cheong Wa Dae stated it is reviewing the request against domestic legal constraints and Korean Peninsula readiness requirements.

evidence_headlines.title: 靑 "美 호르무즈 파병 요청, 국내법 등 감안해 검토"
호르무즈에 파병시 어떤 군함 보내나
정부, 호르무즈 해협 '통항 기여' 고심…군함 투입 등 다각도 검토 관측

topics.topic_en: US USTR Section 301 Hearings Target Korea Trade Practices
topics.topic_ko: 미국 무역법 301조 조사 공청회 한국 참여
topics.summary: The US Trade Representative held Section 301 hearings on structural overcapacity practices from May 5–8, with Korea sending officials to defend its industrial policies; the hearings are seen as groundwork for potential new tariffs to replace the previously struck-down reciprocal tariffs, adding uncertainty to Korea-US trade relations.

evidence_headlines.title: 美 USTR, 5일부터 한국 등 16개국과 무역법 301조 공청회…'과잉 생산 관련'
美, 대체관세 사전작업 '301조 공청회' 실시…韓 "과잉생산 품목 자발적 구조조정" 해명
美 USTR '301조 과잉생산 조사' 본격화… 韓, '정당성' 방어 나선다

method_notes: Captured via Anthropic API (Sonnet 4.6) with web_search for live Korean political coverage. Topic labels (topic_en) are stable handles for cross-snapshot rank comparison.
